race.description: Select Events Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: FLAUNTER (13) closed well to finish second on debut over this course and distance then went up to 1300m last time and found one better again after leading. Back to the 1000m today and draws a wide gate so probably takes a sit. Handy filly who shouldn't be a maiden for long. GREYT REMLAP (9) last appeared when safely held on debut over this distance at Muswellbrook on 8 March. Recent trial winner at this track so we might see something more positive this prep. MR CACCIATORE (3) started favourite on debut recently over 900m at Newcastle but after leading for home could not keep going. Should offer a bit more today in this easier maiden. YES TO INFINITY (6) talented three-year-old gelding with two wins from two trials, most recently at Scone over 1000m. Watch for any market confidence.
